name: Siege hand
useful_for: Gate stress, tunnel detection, fire suppression, breach preparation.
limit: Needs time, engineers, catalysts and protection.

name: Battlefield spark
useful_for: Smoke, horse panic, shield flare, fire control, morale shock.
limit: Exhausts quickly and may hit allies if control fails.

name: Wound binder
useful_for: Saving officers, elite troops and plague-important personnel.

name: Weather reader
useful_for: Forecasts, wind reading and small weather nudges.
limit: Cannot control climate; failure can be catastrophic.

name: Oath witness
useful_for: Treaties, vassal oaths, surrender terms, royal marriages.
limit: Power depends on public belief in ritual validity.

name: Counter-mage
useful_for: Detecting hostile casting, disrupting rituals, protecting commanders.
limit: Rare, expensive and often mistrusted by allies.
